remarks:
Welcome to this beautifully turnkey single-story home situated on a desirable corner lot in the Vista Verde at Mediterra community by D.R. Horton. This thoughtfully designed residence offers 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and approximately 1,898 square feet of living space, and has been gently lived in for approximately two years. The interior has been freshly painted and features laminate flooring throughout the entryway, kitchen, bathrooms, and laundry room, while the bedrooms are comfortably carpeted and enhanced with energy-efficient LED lighting. New shutter blinds throughout the home add style and privacy. Vaulted ceilings in the dining, living, and kitchen areas create an open and airy atmosphere filled with natural light.

The open-concept kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances, including a KitchenAid six-burner gas range, built-in microwave/oven combo, Energy Star stainless steel dishwasher, and under-cabinet lighting—ideal for everyday living and entertaining.Enjoy outdoor living in the fully landscaped backyard with grass, perfect for relaxation or gatherings. The home is conveniently located directly across the street from the community center, providing easy access to the pool and park amenities. Additional highlights include owned solar panels, offering energy efficiency and potential utility savings. Located within a newer and expanding community, this home combines modern finishes, functional design, and a prime location—making it an excellent home for your family.
